# Darolutamide 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Darolutamide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Darolutamide</strong> 目前有 <strong>18 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Darolutamide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：NUBEQA is indicated for the treatment of adult men with  non‑metastatic castration resistant prostate cancer (nmCRPC) who are at high risk of developing metastatic disease (see section&nbsp;5.1)....</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（99.1%）</li>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（99.1%）</li>
<li>HIV infectious disease（99.0%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（98.7%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（98.7%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（98.6%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（98.3%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（98.3%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（98.2%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（98.2%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（97.6%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（97.6%）</li>
<li>hypoalphalipoproteinemia（97.5%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（97.4%）</li>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（97.3%）</li>
<li>hyperthyroidism（97.3%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（97.1%）</li>
<li>resistance to thyroid hormone due to a mutation in thyroid hormone receptor beta（97.0%）</li>
<li>oral candidiasis（96.8%）</li>
<li>leprosy（96.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/darolutamide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
